summary: Designed 7 creative quantitative concepts leveraging Careerspan's rich assessment data, including Quality-Weighted Fit Score, Evidence Trust Matrix, Gap Heat Map, and Interview Focus Radar. Recommended 3 MVP concepts implementable in markdown/Gamma with clear differentiation from standard recruiting.
learnings: The data structure is exceptionally rich for visualization - every skill has 7+ quantitative fields (rating, required level, importance, evidence type, evidence rating, story linkage)
Evidence type (Story+profile vs Profile) is a powerful differentiation lever that no standard recruiter tracks
Alignment verdicts (CLEAR/PARTIAL/GAP) from the LLM analysis provide ready-made categorization for visual groupings
Importance weighting (1-10 scale) enables weighted scoring that shows strategic fit, not just raw match percentage
